notes: Upstream currently ships installer/ClickOnce distribution; no official portable ZIP payload is published.
This manifest runs the official installer silently and keeps Scoop as the package/update entry point.
If UAC prompts appear, run from an elevated PowerShell.

uninstaller.script: $keys = @('HKLM:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*','HKLM:\Software\WOW6432Node\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*','HKCU:\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Uninstall\*'); $app = Get-ItemProperty -Path $keys -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -like 'WhisperTyping*' } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -eq $app) { warn 'WhisperTyping uninstall entry not found. Remove it from Windows Settings > Apps if needed.'; return }; if ($app.QuietUninstallString) { Start-Process -FilePath 'cmd.exe' -ArgumentList '/c', $app.QuietUninstallString -Wait; return }; if ($app.UninstallString) { Start-Process -FilePath 'cmd.exe' -ArgumentList '/c', ($app.UninstallString + ' /quiet /qn /norestart') -Wait; return }; warn 'No uninstall command found for WhisperTyping.'
